organization.name: Principle Lending
organization.short_description: Principle Lending is built on the relationships we make every day. When you work with us, you are family. Built on over a century in collective experience in third party originations, your vision is our vision. We work hand in hand with you through our financial products, services, and so much more. Accessibility, responsiveness, and customer focus are the foundation of our business. We prioritize creating a personally crafted mortgage experience that is efficient, simple, and convenient.

54a2ade07468693318edb134.name: Chris Pickrell
54a2ade07468693318edb134.title: Regional Sales Manager
54a2ade07468693318edb134.headline: Regional Sales Manager at Silverton Mortgage NMLS 1989179 company #1561

organization.name: Silverton Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 1201 Peachtree St NE, Suite 2050, Atlanta, GA 30361, US
organization.short_description:
Silverton Mortgage is a direct residential mortgage lender based in Atlanta, Georgia, founded in 1998. The company has grown significantly and is now licensed in 46 states, focusing on in-house loan processing to ensure faster closings and effective customer communication. As a subsidiary of Vanderbilt Mortgage and Finance, Inc. since 2018, Silverton Mortgage employs approximately 383 people and generates annual revenue of $114.5 million.

The company offers a variety of mortgage products, including Conventional, FHA, VA, Jumbo, and USDA loans, as well as 100% financing options for eligible buyers. Loan Originators work closely with borrowers to find the best mortgage solutions tailored to their financial situations. Silverton Mortgage emphasizes a collaborative culture and community contributions, operating under the belief that success is measured by customer outcomes. The Silverton Foundation, established by President Josh Moffitt, provides assistance to families with critically ill children, showcasing the company's commitment to social impact.

organization.name: Mortgage Solutions Financial
organization.raw_address: 7450 Campus Dr, Colorado Springs, Colorado 80920, US
organization.short_description:
Mortgage Solutions Financial is a family-owned mortgage company established in 1995 by retired Air Force officer Roy Clennan. Based in Colorado Springs, Colorado, the company offers a wide range of mortgage services, including home purchases, refinancing, and access to home equity through various loan programs. They operate nationwide with branches in locations such as Ocean Springs, MS, and Harker Heights, TX, and employ around 190 staff members.

The company provides several loan options, including FHA, VA, rural home loans, farm loans, conventional loans, and unconventional loans. They focus on simplifying the mortgage process with less paperwork and quicker approvals, ensuring personalized service for their clients. Mortgage Solutions Financial has assisted over 130,000 families and has received recognition for its customer service, holding an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau. The leadership team includes President Robert J. Clennan and Chief Compliance Officer Marilyn Harris, who emphasize a community-focused approach to mortgage lending.

organization.name: Plaza Home Mortgage, Inc.
organization.raw_address: 9808 Scranton Rd, Suite 3000, San Diego, California 92121, US
organization.short_description:
Plaza Home Mortgage, Inc. is a full-service mortgage lender based in San Diego, California. Founded in December 2000, the company is a national leader in wholesale and correspondent lending, licensed in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. Plaza operates with a decentralized structure, featuring regional loan centers and underwriters to maintain strong connections to local markets.

The company serves clients through two main channels: a Wholesale Channel for mortgage brokers, offering a variety of products and technology for efficient deal processing, and a National Correspondent Channel for mortgage banks, providing liquidity and accelerated execution. Plaza offers a wide range of mortgage programs, including conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo, and reverse mortgages, along with innovative technology solutions like the BREEZE loan origination system. Plaza emphasizes personalized service and has a team of experienced professionals dedicated to client satisfaction.

organization.name: MiMutual Wholesale powered by Supreme Lending
organization.raw_address: 911 Military Street, Port Huron, Michigan 48060, US
organization.short_description:
MiMutual Wholesale powered by Supreme Lending is a wholesale mortgage lending division of Michigan Mutual, Inc., based in Port Huron, Michigan. Established in 1992, the company focuses on renovation, FHA, and VA loans. It operates under the umbrella of Supreme Lending, which enhances its offerings with advanced technology for quicker closings and a wider range of loan options.

The company specializes in various mortgage products, including conventional loans, FHA loans, VA loans, and USDA loans. It also offers a Down Payment Assistance program with flexible options. MiMutual Wholesale is committed to customer satisfaction, boasting impressive performance metrics such as 99% on-time closings and 97% customer satisfaction. The team consists of experienced loan officers dedicated to providing quality service to brokers and partners in the region.

66f2a987baa3770001fb4d2d.headline: CBC Mortgage Agency - Home of the Chenoa Fund Down Payment Assistance Program - Every Monday 2:00 PM EST Product Training - Call for link - 317-625-3287 - bob.sweeney@chenoafund.org

organization.name: CBC Mortgage Agency
organization.raw_address: 912 W Baxter Dr, 150, South Jordan, Utah 84095, US
organization.short_description:
CBC Mortgage Agency (CBCMA) is a public-purpose government lender and Tribally Designated Housing Entity of the Cedar Band of Paiutes, based in South Jordan, Utah. The agency operates the Chenoa Fund, which provides down payment assistance (DPA) programs across the United States, excluding New York. CBCMA aims to enhance homeownership opportunities for underserved communities by addressing barriers such as insufficient down payments.

The Chenoa Fund offers various DPA solutions, including FHA purchase loans designed for first-time homebuyers and individuals with low credit scores. Key programs include the Chenoa Fund FHA Purchase Loan, the Chenoa 5% Forgivable DPA, and the Chenoa 5% Repayable DPA, all featuring flexible terms and benefits to support homebuyers. CBCMA has assisted over 25,000 borrowers and collaborates with quality mortgage lenders while adhering to FHA and Fannie Mae guidelines. The agency is committed to promoting economic stability and homeownership in diverse communities.

organization.name: Total Quality Lending
organization.raw_address: 630 W Carmel Dr, 160, Carmel, Indiana 46032, US
organization.short_description:
Total Quality Lending partners with real estate investors to support sustainable growth and long-term wealth. Built on trust, transparency, and collaboration, our team is committed to delivering smarter financing solutions and a better experience at every stage.








TX notice: 
"CONSUMERS WISHING TO FILE A COMPLAINT AGAINST A COMPANY OR A RESIDENTIAL MORTGAGE LOAN ORIGINATOR SHOULD COMPLETE AND SEND A COMPLAINT FORM TO THE TEXAS DEPARTMENT OF SAVINGS AND MORTGAGE LENDING, 2601 NORTH LAMAR, SUITE 201, AUSTIN, TEXAS 78705. COMPLAINT FORMS AND INSTRUCTIONS MAY BE OBTAINED FROM THE DEPARTMENT'S WEBSITE AT WWW.SML.TEXAS.GOV. A TOLL-FREE CONSUMER HOTLINE IS AVAILABLE AT 1-877-276-5550. THE DEPARTMENT MAINTAINS A RECOVERY FUND TO MAKE PAYMENTS OF CERTAIN ACTUAL OUT OF POCKET DAMAGES SUSTAINED BY BORROWERS CAUSED BY ACTS OF LICENSED RESIDENTIAL MORTGAGE LOAN ORIGINATORS. A WRITTEN APPLICATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT FROM THE RECOVERY FUND MUST BE FILED WITH AND INVESTIGATED BY THE DEPARTMENT PRIOR TO THE PAYMENT OF A CLAIM. FOR MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE RECOVERY FUND, PLEASE CONSULT THE DEPARTMENT'S WEBSITE AT WWW.SML.TEXAS.GOV."


Total Quality Lending offers to refinance and home purchase loans nationwide.

Our Core Values: FAMILY, CHARACTER, EXTREME OWNERSHIP, EVOLVE, DISCIPLINE, LEAD BY EXAMPLE, EQUANIMITY & CREATE A POSITIVE IMPACT.

Total Quality Lending NMLS # 1933377. Licensed by the Department of Financial Protection and Innovation under the California Financing Law, Total Quality Lending, NMLS# 1933377. Phone (800) 304-1925.

organization.name: Sprout Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 90 Merrick Ave, East Meadow, New York 11554, US
organization.short_description:
Sprout Mortgage was a nationwide mortgage lender in the U.S., founded in 2016 by Michael Strauss. The company specialized in non-Qualified Mortgage (non-QM) products, catering to borrowers with non-traditional financial profiles, such as self-employed individuals and real estate investors. At its peak, Sprout Mortgage averaged $380 million in monthly loan volume and was licensed in 46 states and Washington, D.C. The company operated through wholesale, correspondent, and retail channels, employing over 300 people across 11 branches.

Sprout offered a diverse range of mortgage solutions, including Bank Statement loans, Asset Depletion, and Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) options. It also provided traditional QM and government products like VA and FHA loans. The company utilized technology tools to streamline the mortgage process, helping brokers efficiently match loan scenarios and analyze income. Sprout Mortgage aimed to be a comprehensive resource for borrowers, focusing on flexible qualifications and competitive pricing.

organization.raw_address: 950 Glenn Dr, Suite 150, Folsom, California 95630, US
organization.short_description:
Sierra Pacific Mortgage Company, Inc. (SPM) is an independent mortgage banking firm established in 1986 and based in Folsom, California. It has become one of the largest mortgage lenders in the U.S., originating and purchasing billions in residential loans across the country. SPM holds licenses in 49 states and the District of Columbia, supported by multiple Regional Fulfillment Centers and over 129 branch offices. The company is committed to quality lending practices and exceptional customer service, operating under the motto "Promises Made. Promises Kept."

SPM offers a range of competitively priced residential mortgage products, including government-backed and conventional loans such as FHA, VA, and USDA options. The company conducts business through wholesale, retail, and correspondent lending channels, focusing on providing efficient service and effective communication to enhance the borrower experience. Led by President Jim Coffrini, SPM aims to be the lender of choice, emphasizing innovation and strong partnerships in the mortgage industry.

organization.raw_address: 3905 W 49th St, Sioux Falls, South Dakota, US
organization.short_description:
Windsor Mortgage is a wholesale mortgage lending division of Plains Commerce Bank, based in Sioux Falls, South Dakota. Established in 2016, it specializes in providing premium mortgage services to clients, brokers, and partners. Under the leadership of CEO Chris Vinson, Windsor Mortgage focuses on empowering mortgage professionals with tools, resources, coaching, and technology to enhance their success.

The company offers a tailored mortgage experience throughout all loan stages, featuring dedicated mortgage experts for direct support, coaching and training for originators, warehouse lending, contract processing, and compliance management. Windsor Mortgage provides an extensive lineup of residential loan products, including government loans, conventional, jumbo, and bridge loans, enabling clients to deliver diverse solutions efficiently. With a commitment to superior customer service and strong relationships, Windsor Mortgage aims to be the best fit for its partners in the competitive wholesale mortgage market.

organization.name: Rate
organization.raw_address: 3940 N. Ravenswood, Chicago, IL 60613, US
organization.short_description:
Rate, based in Chicago, is a residential mortgage company founded in 2000 by Victor Ciardelli. The company specializes in home purchase, refinance, and home equity loans, emphasizing low rates and fast approvals. With over 340 branches across 47-50 states and more than 4,000 agents, Rate operates nationwide and offers services through online applications, mobile apps, and in-person support.

Rate utilizes advanced technology to streamline the mortgage process, providing quick preapprovals and one-day mortgage approvals. The company offers a variety of mortgage options, including fixed-rate, adjustable-rate, FHA, VA, and specialized loans for unique borrower needs. Key programs include PowerBid Approval for competitive bidding and OneDown for low-to-moderate income borrowers, which provides down payment assistance. Rate is committed to serving diverse customer profiles, including Spanish speakers and self-employed individuals, while maintaining a focus on transparency and customer service.

organization.name: MeridianLink
organization.raw_address: Irvine, CA 92618, US
organization.short_description:
MeridianLink, Inc. is a prominent provider of cloud-based digital lending, account opening, and data verification solutions for financial institutions and consumer reporting agencies. Founded in 1998 in Costa Mesa, California, the company has played a significant role in modernizing financial services technology. MeridianLink launched its first Software as a Service (SaaS) platform in 2005 and has since expanded its offerings through strategic acquisitions, including Thoma Bravo and The Compliance Institute.

The company’s solutions include mission-critical loan origination software, digital lending capabilities, and compliance tools, all designed to enhance the customer experience and streamline operations for financial institutions. MeridianLink supports around 1,200 customers and 300,000 end users, focusing on democratizing lending and fostering innovation through a partner marketplace with numerous integrations. As of 2023, MeridianLink celebrates 25 years in business, highlighting its commitment to driving digital transformation in the financial sector.

organization.name: Oaktree Funding Corp.
organization.raw_address: 3133 west frye road, chandler, az, united states
organization.short_description:
Oaktree Funding Corp. is a licensed mortgage banker based in Upland, California, established in 1989. The company specializes in a variety of home loan products, particularly focusing on Non-QM (Non-Qualified Mortgage) lending. Oaktree operates through three main channels: Wholesale, Correspondent, and Retail Lending, catering to brokers, large banking customers, and individual borrowers. It is approved by government agencies for FHA, USDA, and VA loans.

With over 30 years of experience, Oaktree has become a leading Non-QM lender in the U.S. The company emphasizes professionalism, compliance, and customer service, generating approximately $20.7 million in revenue and employing around 130 people. Oaktree offers a comprehensive range of home loan products, including customized Non-QM loans, government-backed loans, and various options for 1-4 unit properties. Its flexible Correspondent Lending Platform provides multiple delivery options, ensuring competitive pricing and quality support for its clients.

organization.name: Carrington Mortgage Services, LLC
organization.raw_address: 500 N. State College Blvd., Suites 1030, 1300 and 1400, Orange, California 92868, US
organization.short_description:
Carrington Mortgage Services, LLC is a direct mortgage lender based in California, founded in 2007. As a subsidiary of Carrington Holding Company, LLC, it operates as one of the largest privately held non-bank lenders in the United States. The company is licensed to lend in 48 states and has served approximately 1.4 million customers.

Carrington offers a range of loan products, including government-backed mortgages like FHA and VA loans, as well as non-QM loan options for borrowers with poor credit. They cater primarily to individuals with low credit scores and those who have experienced recent negative credit events, providing loans that may require low or no down payments.

organization.raw_address: 306 Northcreek Blvd, Goodlettsville, TN 37072, US
organization.short_description:
Acopia, LLC is a privately-held mortgage banking company based in Goodlettsville, TN, founded in 2007. It specializes in residential mortgage lending, aiming to help qualified homebuyers achieve home ownership. Acopia operates nationally with a retail division called Acopia Home Loans, focusing on customer service and innovative lending solutions.

The company offers a variety of residential mortgage products, including conventional loans, FHA, VA, USDA, and specialty options. Acopia is known for its 0%-low down payment options and the "Honoring Our Heroes" program, which provides tailored loans for veterans, teachers, and first responders. With a team of over 200 licensed mortgage professionals, Acopia emphasizes integrity and exceptional service in its operations. The company has a strong reputation in the industry and is a direct seller-servicer for Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and Ginnie Mae.

organization.name: Midwest Business Funding
organization.raw_address: 10412 Allisonville Rd, Fishers, Indiana 46038, US
organization.short_description: Midwest Business Funding was founded in 2008 in Indianapolis, Indiana.  MBF started out as a Factoring company serving businesses  primarily in Indiana.   Today we have become well known throughout the Midwest providing short term loan products for small to midsize growing businesses.  With our early success and feedback from our clients our company fills a unique gap in the commercial lending space for growing businesses.  Midwest Business Funding provides Factoring, Short Term Loans, PO Financing and Equipment Financing to our clients.  Many of our clients are outpacing their capital and current loan structure.  This is where we step in.   Unlike most business lenders, we work closely with our clients to ensure they are doing the right things to secure proper financing in the future and adding value to their business.  We don't just lend money- we become a valued partner helping our clients in many forms of Financing, capital structure, operations, sales and many other facets of business.

organization.short_description:
Merchants Bank of Indiana is a key banking subsidiary of Merchants Bancorp, a diversified bank holding company based in Carmel, Indiana. With $18.8 billion in assets and $12.4 billion in deposits as of March 31, 2025, the bank is recognized for its strong performance in the U.S. banking sector.

The bank specializes in various financial services, including multi-family mortgage banking, mortgage warehousing, and community banking. It provides financing and servicing for multi-family housing and healthcare facilities, as well as commercial loans and deposit services. Merchants Bank of Indiana also offers a range of consumer and deposit products, such as competitive money market accounts, Flex Index CDs, Fixed Rate CDs, and All in One Loans, aimed at helping customers save on mortgage interest. The bank emphasizes local expertise in personal and business banking, catering to a diverse clientele across Indiana and surrounding markets.

organization.name: PowerTPO
organization.raw_address: National Lender, US
organization.short_description:
PowerTPO is a mortgage origination company founded in 2022, based in Columbia, Maryland. It operates as an agency wholesale and non-delegated correspondent lender in the financial technology sector. The company was established by Brett Arsta and Michael George, who bring over 150 years of combined experience in third-party origination. PowerTPO is backed by Lower, LLC, a recognized leader in fintech.

The company offers a variety of mortgage products, including conventional, jumbo, USDA loans, and cash-out refinancing. PowerTPO emphasizes competitive pricing, streamlined processes, and exceptional service, providing a dedicated point of contact for personalized support. It has formed strategic partnerships with platforms like Lender Price Marketplace and ARIVE to enhance its offerings and improve efficiency. PowerTPO is committed to serving wholesale mortgage professionals and focuses on innovation in the real estate finance industry.

organization.name: First Financial Bank
organization.raw_address: 255 E 5th Street, Cincinnati, OH 45202, US
organization.short_description:
First Financial Bank is a regional financial institution founded in 1863, originally as The First National Bank of Hamilton in Hamilton, Ohio. Headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio, it serves clients primarily in Ohio, Kentucky, Indiana, and Illinois, operating over 140 full-service banking centers. The bank has a community-focused approach, with teams of specialists who are familiar with the neighborhoods they serve.

The bank offers a wide range of financial services, including commercial and retail banking, mortgage banking, and wealth management. It specializes in small business lending, providing products like revolving lines of credit and participation in the Small Business Administration Guaranteed Loan Program. First Financial Bank is dedicated to building relationships with individuals, businesses, and communities, positioning itself as a trusted advisor for clients looking to thrive financially.
